tokenCost.description: Estimated token cost multiplier relative to single-agent baseline (e.g., '~6x')

failureModesToWatch.description: Failure mode codes relevant to this topology selection

existingSkill.description: Existing agent-studio skill or pattern to use for this topology

escalationPath.description: Next topology to consider if this one proves insufficient

alternativeTopologies.description: Alternative topologies considered and why they were not recommended
